text: interviewer asked where i see myself in 5 years and i said 'not here' by accident
my resume says proficient in excel. i can make the cells bigger. thats it.
linkedin influencer posted about grinding at 4am. sir this is a wendys
went to a networking event. networked with the cheese platter exclusively
cover letter said im passionate about data entry. we both know thats a lie
considering a career pivot to professional napper. hiring market looks good
got passed over for promotion again. the new guy started 3 months ago. cool
spilled coffee on my shirt 10 min before the interview. went in anyway. power move
resume gap explanation: i was finding myself. i found depression
linkedin congratulated me on my work anniversary at a job i hate. thanks algorithm
networking is just small talk with business cards and i hate both
wrote 'detail oriented' on my resume with a typo. the irony writes itself
pivoting to tech at 35. my back already hurts from the desk i dont have yet
they promoted the guy who takes 2 hour lunches. i need to start taking longer lunches
interview asked for my greatest weakness. i said 'this interview' and they laughed. didnt get the job
my resume is 60% creative writing and 40% prayers
someone on linkedin wrote a 12 paragraph post about buying coffee. im done
exchanged business cards at a mixer. used it as a bookmark. networking complete
cover letter: i am writing to express my interest. narrator: they were not interested
career counselor said follow your passion. my passion is sleeping. now what
been acting manager for 8 months with no title change or raise. love that for me
wore a suit to a zoom interview. basketball shorts on the bottom. duality of man
resume says team player. i eat lunch alone in my car
linkedin said 847 people viewed my profile. still no job offers. cool stalkers
networking event had a cash bar. networking on a budget is just standing there sober
my cover letter starts with 'to whom it may concern' bc it concerns nobody apparently
thought about becoming a life coach. cant even coach myself to bed before midnight
promotion went to someone who doesnt know how to unmute on zoom. justice is dead
interviewer said they'd call me back. that was 2019.
padded my resume so much it needs its own zip code
linkedin post: lost my job, heres what i learned. 47k likes. trauma is content now
free food at the networking event was the only connection i made
cover letter word count: 487. words that are true: maybe 12
wanted to be an astronaut. ended up in accounts receivable. close enough
they said the promotion cycle is transparent. transparent like a brick wall
showed up to interview at wrong building. still went in. different company hired me
my resume has more versions than a marvel movie. none of them are accurate
linkedin recruiter messaged me for a job i already have. the system is broken
networking tip: stand near the exit so you can leave faster
wrote 'synergy' in my cover letter and lost a piece of my soul
career pivot #4 this year. at this point im just spinning
got promoted to a title that doesnt exist. still no raise tho
brought 20 copies of my resume to the interview. they wanted digital. cool
resume says leadership experience. i was team captain in 6th grade kickball
linkedin notification: someone you dont know endorsed you for a skill you dont have
tried to network by complimenting someones shoes. they were wearing crocs. committed now
cover letter took 4 hours. application status: auto rejected in 30 seconds
thought about going back to school. then i remembered school
my boss got promoted for my project. i got a gift card. a GIFT CARD
interview asked me to sell them this pen. i panicked and kept the pen
resume says bilingual. i know english and sarcasm
linkedin humble brag: so blessed to announce my 47th career achievement this month
networking event nametag fell in the punch bowl. thats my legacy now
tailored my cover letter to the wrong company. sent it anyway. chaos mode
was gonna pivot to freelance but my only skill is showing up sometimes
promotion meeting got rescheduled 5 times. at this point demote me i dont care
handshake was too sweaty at the interview. they definitely noticed. i definitely lost
listed hobbies on resume: reading (reddit), cooking (microwave), sports (watching)
linkedin algorithm shows me jobs im not qualified for. thanks for the reality check
went to a career fair. got 3 pens and zero callbacks
cover letter: im a quick learner. reality: still dont know what my job title means
midlife career crisis at 27. is this early or on time
boss said ill get promoted when im ready. ive been ready for 3 years janet
zoom interview forgot to turn off cat filter. purrfessional moment
my resume is basically a work of fiction at this point. pulitzer worthy
linkedin connection request from someone i made eye contact with once at a conference
networking pro tip: if you hold a drink in both hands nobody can make you shake hands
applied to 200 jobs. got 2 responses. both were rejections. efficiency
career aptitude test said i should be a forest ranger. i work in IT. pain
they gave the promotion to the ceo's nephew. meritocracy is alive and well
wore my lucky tie to the interview. tripped on it walking in. luck is fake
resume format changed 3 times today bc linkedin said so
linkedin post about gratitude has more engagement than my actual work. noted
went to a meetup. met no one. ate all the pizza. success??
cover letter: im excited about this opportunity. me, actually: im excited about rent money
pivoting from marketing to literally anything else. applications open
been employee of the month 0 times in 6 years. consistent king
panel interview with 7 people. i blacked out. apparently i got the job??
resume gap: 2020-2021. interviewer: say no more. me: thank god
linkedin says congrats on 10 years in your field. 10 years of what exactly
networking is just collecting anxiety in a room full of strangers
cover letter generator wrote something better than me in 4 seconds. im the robot now
quiet promotion: more work, same title, same pay, new responsibilities. blessed
interviewer asked about my 5 year plan. bold of them to assume i plan
resume says self starter. alarm goes off 6 times before i move
linkedin guru said quit your job and follow your dreams. my dream is health insurance
career fair table had candy. i took candy and left. efficient networking
wrote 'adaptable' on resume bc i cant think of a real skill
was told im overqualified. sir i cant even parallel park
promotion email went to spam. even gmail knew it was fake
brought a portfolio to the interview. they wanted a coding test. portfolios are dead
resume says 'results driven'. results may vary. significantly.
linkedin: 500+ connections. people who would help me move: 0
networking hack: introduce yourself then immediately forget their name. classic me
asked for a raise. got a pizza party. the cheese was cold
cover letter ending: i look forward to hearing from you. the void: silence
considering a career in crime bc at least the hours are flexible
skipped for promotion bc i 'need more visibility'. im literally right here
interview went great until they asked about salary expectations. i panicked and said a number. wrong number
my resume font choice has gotten more attention than my actual experience
